betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Space Elevator§f is a §6single block§f multiblock controller that, when paired with a §6Space Elevator Chip§f (advancedrocketry:elevatorchip), provides §6one-way transport§f between a planet's surface and a deployed space station. It is the §6endgame mobility block§f of the AR progression — the cheapest way to move cargo and passengers to orbit without launching a rocket.

§6Production Path (spaceelevatorcontroller.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  . d .
  a b a
  c c c
  ```
- Key: `d`=§6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), `a`=§6Advanced Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:2), `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `c`=§6coilAluminum§f (forge:ore_dict)
- Output: 1x §6Space Elevator§f (advancedrocketry:spaceelevatorcontroller)
- Multiblock structure: a 3×3 column of §6coilAluminum§f extending upward 64 blocks to a §6platform block§f in orbit

The elevator requires a §6Space Elevator Chip§f (advancedrocketry:elevatorchip, crafted in the §6Precision Assembler§f from §6Tracking Circuit§f, §6Advanced Circuit§f, and a §6Data Unit§f) to designate the destination station. Players can ride the elevator by right-clicking the controller — they teleport to the station in §610 seconds§f, taking any inventory with them.

The space elevator is a prerequisite for the §6Interstellar Mission§f (chain) and the §6Warp Travel§f (10038) chain. It is also the foundation of every §6cargo logistics§f network that needs to move items between a planet and orbit without a rocket.

§eTip§f: Build the elevator's §6coilAluminum column§f straight up from the controller — any deviation breaks the multiblock. Use a §6Wrench§f to right-click each coil block to bind it to the controller. The elevator consumes §61000 RF per use§f, so connect it to a §6Fusion Reactor§f (chain).
